findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "search_active_cars" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Search for cars in the United States and Canada market with comprehensive filters. This endpoint allows searching market vehicles that are up for sale in US and…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
